resources.string: Forwards touch events from the SBS stereo overlay to the projected app at the correct screen coordinates.

1. Tap [Touch forwarding disabled - tap to enable]
 - grant accessibility permission for SBS Projector
 2. Tap [Start SBS]
 - allow to send notifications when prompted
 - grant *display over other apps* permission when prompted
 3. On the *Share your screen with SBS projector?* dialog choose *Share one app* and proceed
 4. Select the app you want to project
 5. Put your phone in the VR headset


To stop the projection: tap the STOP button at the top of the overlay,
or pull down the notification and tap [Stop SBS].
